title: NetherStorage
description: A mod for b1.7.3 that adds Nether chests and bags that work similar to the Ender chests/ pouches from the Ender Storage mod in more recent versions of Minecraft.
body:
# NetherStorage NetherStorage is a mod for b1.7.3 that adds Nether chests and bags that work similar to the Ender chests/ pouches from the Ender Storage mod in more recent versions of Minecraft. ## Requirements Modloader
Forge
[ItemNBT](https://github.com/MartinSVK12/retrostorage/releases/tag/b1.0) (optional)
